title: Midnight Velvety American Cherry Pudding
description: A creamy and rich dessert featuring poached glace cherries, made in individual ramekins.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the almond milk, maple syrup, coconut oil, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the almond flour, baking soda, and salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the saucepan and whisk until smooth.
Coat six 6-ounce ramekins with coconut oil and pour the batter into each.
Place the ramekins on a baking sheet and bake for 18 minutes.
While the pudding is baking, poach the glace cherries in boiling water for 2-3 minutes, or until they float.
Remove the pudding from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the pudding warm, topped with poached glace cherries and a sprinkle of almond flour.
